purpose: Define perfect as six of six evaluator-owned fidelity domains passing without an unknown required observable.

geometry_scale.label: Geometry / scale
geometry_scale.pass_rule: all required observables are calibrated, receipt-bound, and independently evaluated

kinematics.label: Kinematics
kinematics.pass_rule: all excitation and held-out joint residual gates pass

action_timing.label: Action / timing
action_timing.pass_rule: the common-clock timing evaluator passes with no inferred timestamp substitution

contact_compliance.label: Contact / compliance
contact_compliance.pass_rule: the held-out contact mechanism and consequence gates pass

actuator_load_path.label: Actuator / load path
actuator_load_path.pass_rule: load-response parameters and non-target consequences pass held-out evaluation

task_ee_consequence.label: Task / EE consequence
task_ee_consequence.pass_rule: all frozen strict task and end-effector consequence gates pass

proof_boundary: Measurement-readiness and closure accounting only. This contract does not promote a simulator, policy, task score, physical capability, or training row.
